stemHtml: Which of the following options are the correct frequency band, propagation type, and range of usable frequencies for an ILS localiser?

options.a: UHF, space waves, 329.15 MHz to 335 MHz.
options.b: VHF, ground waves, 108 MHz to 117.975 MHz.
options.c: VHF, space waves, 108.10 MHz to 111.975 MHz.
options.d: UHF, sky waves, 190 kHz to 1750 KHz.
